le , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class GenericJNIActor extends TypedAtomicActor Use the Java Native Interface to execute a native method. To use this actor, first configure the arguments of the native method by right clic

he arguments of the native method by right clicking on the actor and selecting 'Configure Arguments', then configure the library name and location, then create the JNI files. Note that under Windows, your path needs to include the directory
